nodes.label: AI as tool for overcoming creative block
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable source of filler ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help come up with fresh ideas or new ways of thinking to pursue

nodes.label: AI as helper for complicated tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to cognitive exercise
nodes.grounding_span: AI is the fastest and most efficient way to do that

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Often AI will come up with things that are far-fetched, inaccurate, random

nodes.label: AI as supplementary aide to human expertise
nodes.label_negative: AI involvement in core trained tasks
nodes.grounding_span: when things get out of my area of knowledge or, again, if I hit a road block, that is when I use AI

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: My 'collaboration' with AI is limited entirely to whatever I need help with at that current moment

nodes.label: AI as mental health understanding aid
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to mental atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: The brain is a muscle and I want to ensure that it's healthy and getting as much exercise as possible

nodes.label: Creative problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: help come up with fresh ideas or new ways of thinking to pursue

nodes.label: Epistemic accuracy and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: narrow down whatever it comes up with and pursue those ideas independently

nodes.label: Professional autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle most of my main tasks that I am specifically trained/educated to do by myself

nodes.label: Cognitive health and self-efficacy
nodes.grounding_span: The brain is a muscle and I want to ensure that it's healthy and getting as much exercise as possible

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: My most satisfied usage of AI was when I first decided to use it for a brainstorming purpose

nodes.label: Skepticism and caution toward AI
nodes.grounding_span: I am very skeptical of most of the ideas it comes up with

nodes.label: Intentional caution about over-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I have a couple of coworkers who have developed a reliance on AI...that caused me to really evaluate about where I use AI

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I can see myself continuing to observe how other people use it and hopefully finding more ways to utilize it

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: it will take a good few tries and prompt revising before it comes up with what I'm really looking for

nodes.label: Strategic domain compartmentalization
nodes.grounding_span: If it's main tasks I'm educated for, like financial statements and such, AI is not involved
